title: Digital Extremes reveals Warframe: Tau, the new planetary system with a noir theme
summary: The expansion introduces a detective and film noir setting in the Warframe universe.

title: Soulframe announces Warsong update with new dark progression and wolf mounts
summary: The developers open the game to all players for a limited time and detail the patch content.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced reaches 2 million sales and Ubisoft responds to DLC controversy
summary: The remake of the pirate classic sparks debate over its microtransactions, but is celebrated by players.

title: Obsidian director defends the studio against criticism and confirms they are working on a new Fallout
summary: Josh Sawyer assures that the company's creative DNA remains intact and that they await the green light from Xbox.

title: EA removes microtransactions from College Football 27 after player backlash
summary: The company had added payment options to progress faster but backtracked due to the negative reaction.

title: Sony plans to stop manufacturing physical discs for PlayStation in 2028
summary: The EU admits it cannot prevent Sony's decision, while the former PlayStation boss expresses his sadness.

title: id Software assures it still has the team needed to create the games that made it famous
summary: The creators of DOOM break their silence on the mass layoffs in the industry and reaffirm their creative capacity.

title: Eiichiro Oda fulfills a curse in One Piece chapter 1,188 and could confirm an important theory
summary: The mangaka again repeats a numerical pattern in the chapter number, fueling speculation among fans.

title: Helldivers 2 takes action against super credit abuse and players ask for better ways to earn them
summary: The studio sanctions suspicious activities with the premium currency, while the community criticizes how tedious it is to obtain.

title: Ubisoft officially confirms three new Assassin's Creed games in development
summary: The company announces a significant expansion of the franchise with multiple titles in preparation.

title: Steam reaches record revenue of $11.1 billion in the first six months of the year
summary: Valve's platform experiences its best half-year in gross billing, according to market analysts.

title: Palworld 1.0 update modifies several designs to move away from the appearance of Pokémon
summary: The massive patch introduces visual changes to the creatures to avoid similarities with Nintendo's franchise.

title: Microsoft denies that layoffs are due to replacing employees with foreign workers
summary: The company responds to racist conspiracy theories by stating that decisions are based on business criteria.

title: Meta removes its latest artificial intelligence integration on Instagram after controversy with SAG-AFTRA
summary: The feature generated content using actors' voices without permission, which led to the union's protest.

title: Official art from Avengers: Doomsday shows the X-Men and a controversial new hairstyle for Mystique
summary: The design of the mutants in the next MCU film generates mixed reactions among fans.

title: A bill in Brazil and an Xbox ruling put the focus on player rights
summary: The initiatives seek to protect video game consumers from abusive platform practices.

title: A player wins a legal battle to recover his hacked Xbox account after refusing to rebuy the games
summary: The plaintiff got the court to order the restitution of his profile and digital titles.

title: Warframe hires voice actor Matt Mercer for a role in the game
summary: The developers describe the addition of the Critical Role performer as 'a dream come true'.

title: Valve redesigns Counter-Strike 2's bomb to make it more spectacular but less lethal
summary: The update modifies the explosive's behavior, prioritizing visual impact over direct damage.

title: Pokémon Go celebrates its tenth anniversary with a global Go Fest
summary: The global event includes new creatures, bonuses, and activities to commemorate the game's decade.
